instruction: The yellow price tag should not be muted purple. Restore its proper color on the paper clip icon.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/paper-clip.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m18.375 12.739-7.693 7.693a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l10.94-10.94A3 3 0 1 1 19.5 7.372L8.552 18.32m.009-.01-.01.01m5.699-9.941-7.81 7.81a1.5 1.5 0 0 0 2.112 2.13"/></g>
  <rect id="price-tag" fill="#8c44d0" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="84" y="96" width="28" height="14" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/paper-clip.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m18.375 12.739-7.693 7.693a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l10.94-10.94A3 3 0 1 1 19.5 7.372L8.552 18.32m.009-.01-.01.01m5.699-9.941-7.81 7.81a1.5 1.5 0 0 0 2.112 2.13"/></g>
  <rect id="price-tag" fill="#fde047" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="84" y="96" width="28" height="14" />
</svg>
